message.content:
This is the **Orders page** of the ALADIN B2B Commerce platform (URL: `aladin-web.vercel.app/orders`).  

It is **showing data** (specifically, order metrics) but the main order list is **empty** (no orders found). The page displays:  
- Order status metrics (Total Orders, Pending, Processing, Delivered Today) all showing `0`.  
- A “No orders found” message (with a shopping cart icon) in the main content area, indicating no orders exist to display.  
- Filters/search options for managing orders (e.g., search by order number, status, date).
